reviews.comment:
Malísima experiencia, estando sin combustible me tuve que ir sin poder cargar porque atienden con prioridad a los habitantes de la ciudad (no a turistas).... Decadentes....

(Translated by Google)
Terrible experience. Being out of fuel, I had to leave without being able to fill up because they prioritize city residents (not tourists).... Disgraceful....
